notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger grounds into a force out, first baseman Kyle Manzardo to shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Trent Grisham scores. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Cody Bellinger to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger grounds into a force out, first baseman Kyle Manzardo to shortstop Brayan Rocchio. Trent Grisham scores. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Cody Bellinger to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Will Warren. Steven Kwan scores. Patrick Bailey to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins pops out to first baseman Ben Rice in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins strikes out swinging, catcher Ali Sánchez to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Gavin Williams on the pickoff attempt.
